title: <div> * Dynamic Swarm: Adds &quotDynamic Agent Spawning&quot based on task compl
content:
* Dynamic Swarm: Adds "Dynamic Agent Spawning" based on task complexity.
* Interoperability: Expands the ecosystem to include scaffolding for external CI/CD tools and a Streamlit dashboard for the HRGs.
Acknowledgment of Critique [GRK-ACK-02]
This "Grok revisions" document provides a robust, expert-level analysis of the v2.0 framework, correctly identifying its remaining theoretical blindspots (scalability, runtime security) and proposing concrete, modern tooling (LangGraph, CrewAI, Prometheus) to address them.
I have synthesized these advanced suggestions with the quantified, risk-managed structure of v3.0. The result is v4.0, a prompt that outlines a production-ready, adaptive, and fully governed orchestration system.
AI Orchestration Request v4.0: Adaptive, Governed, and Cyclical Orchestration [AOR-V4]
Objective: Execute a fully-governed, adaptive orchestration to ingest, validate, consolidate, and expand a target repository. This process prioritizes runtime security, scalability, and cyclical refinement via a graph-based framework.
**[NEW v4.0]** Phase 0: Core Principles & Framework [P0]
